{{de-DE|Ich übe jeden Tag.||ICH U-be YE-den TAG.}}
explanation: This phrase helps keep a conversation going when you are learning. It is especially useful for clarification and support.

question: In beginner German, how do you say 'Where are you from?'?
correctAnswer: {{de-DE|Woher kommen Sie?||WO-her KOM-men SEE?}}

explanation: This is a standard introduction or personal-information phrase. It is useful in first meetings, hotels, and simple forms.
